metadata.description: Senior TypeScript developer code review plugin for Claude Code. Dispatches an Opus 4.6 subagent that reviews TS code across 18 angles — quality, type-system correctness, architecture, security, performance, error handling, modern feature adoption — and returns severity-tagged findings with concrete rewrites.

plugins.name: typescript-senior-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive TypeScript code review by an Opus 4.6 senior-developer agent. Reviews quality, type-system correctness, architecture, maintainability, security, performance, error handling, testing, modern feature adoption, and ecosystem fit across 18 angles. Returns severity-tagged findings with concrete code rewrites.
